questions.questionText: What is the coefficient of O₂ in the balanced equation 2Mg + O₂ → 2MgO?
questions.hint: Look at the number in front of O₂.

questions.hint: Look at the number in front of H₂O.

questions.questionText: How many oxygen atoms are on each side of the balanced equation 2H₂ + O₂ → 2H₂O?
